creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Patch applied, thanks!  You are the new maintainer of this port. 

I made one notable change:  The "files" directory of this port 
was getting pretty big, so I put all of the patches that were in 
that directory on my www.freebsd.org site, and changed the 
Makefile to grab them from there.  If you want to do something 
different (besides putting all of them in the port) let me know 
and I'll make the changes.
